KXNZNBLGAME-26JUL120200OTATUA-OTA.rules_primary: If Otago Nuggets wins the Otago Nuggets vs Auckland Tuatara professional New Zealand NBL basketball game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026 at 2:00 AM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
KXNZNBLGAME-26JUL120200OTATUA-OTA.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the team who wins Otago Nuggets vs Auckland Tuatara professional New Zealand NBL basketball game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026 at 2:00 AM EDT. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two weeks). If the cancelled game is not played or is rescheduled further than two weeks out, the market will resolve to a fair price for each team in accordance with the rules.
